word: H3481 - יִשְׂרְאֵלִי - Yisrᵉʼêlîy - yis-reh-ay-lee' - Of Israel

sections.paragraph:
Original: ישׂראלי

Transliteration: yiśre'êlı̂y

Phonetic: yis-reh-ay-lee'

BDB Definition:

Israelite = see Israel " God prevails"
  1. a descendant or inhabitant of the nation of Israel

Origin: from H3478

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adjective
